description: Chill out in style with the Lynx funky flip-flops from puma. With its soft footbed and strong gripped outsole, the journey in this footwear will be an assured awesome one. Upper Fabric upper for dry comfort of the feet Thong straps with stitch detailing and padded inner Thong construction to hold the forefoot in place, and added comfort and style Midsole Soft, cushioned footbed for all-day comfort puma cat logo on the footbed Outsole TPR outsole with round suction points all over for grip and traction shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth Do not machine wash
